title: Smart itineraries
description: Tell Tripma where you want to go and how you like to travel. Get a full day-by-day plan built around you — not a template.

title: Live flight tracking
description: Real-time prices, delays, and alternatives. Tripma watches your flights so you don't have to refresh 40 tabs.

title: Local secrets
description: Skip the tourist traps. Curated spots from people who actually live there — cafés, viewpoints, hidden beaches.

title: Travel with others
description: Planning a group trip? Tripma syncs everyone's preferences and finds the overlap. No more 50-message group chats.

title: One-tap booking
description: Flights, hotels, and experiences — book everything without ever leaving the app. Your whole trip, one place.

title: Offline access
description: No signal in the mountains? No problem. Your itinerary, maps, and bookings are always available offline.
